features: Good Quality: The ultimate in quality ,design and hygiene; Comes with 6 pcs 80and 6pcs 50 of girt replacement pads
Portable: Then grits are easily replaced to create new, two-sided file for each use
Sterilizable: Stainless steel handle can be sterilized after removal of the stick -on grits
Comfortable: Super comfortable grip features a built-in thumb rest
Flexible: Thin filing area makes it flexible for use on different areas of the feet and between toes
description: Product Description Lifestan Pedicure Foot File and Callus Remover for Hard Skin Professional Dual-sided, Two kinds of files This foot file is easily replaced, comes with 6 pcs #80and 6pcs #150 of girt replacement pads,suitable for different skin types. Waterproof It's made with good quality stainless steel.so it can not only withstand great strength, but also waterproof,so you can enjoy your pedicure spa anywhere. Large Size Please recognize the large size model, the total length is 25cm about 9.8 inches, ergonomic design, making pedicure easier. Healthy Disposable replacement pad avoid bacterial infections, it make your much more healthier and safer when you enjoy pedicure. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Soak feet in warm, soapy water before use. Avoid excessive filing to prevent skin damage. Clean tool with mild, soapy water and dry after each use to prevent infections.
